_note: Curated CLEAR-DIRECTION real-prose pairs (gate re-curation, option b, 2026-06-17). Each directional pair passes the counterfactual test: premise is a general law/definition/design-decision that stands alone; conclusion is a specific consequence that collapses if the premise is removed. cd-001..005 are grounded in Daftari's own docs (CLAUDE.md key decisions); the rest are textbook derivations phrased as natural prose. Symmetric pairs reused unchanged from v1 (they passed the gate).

directional.premise: Daftari stores every document as a markdown file with YAML frontmatter, and its SQLite index is built entirely by reading those files.
directional.conclusion: Daftari's .daftari/index.db can be deleted and rebuilt at any time without data loss, since the markdown files remain the sole source of truth.

directional.premise: Every write operation in Daftari auto-commits the change to git.
directional.conclusion: Any earlier revision of a Daftari document can be recovered later, because git retains the complete commit history of every write.

directional.premise: Daftari's write locks are file-level and expire automatically after a 60-second TTL.
directional.conclusion: A Daftari writer that crashes mid-edit cannot permanently block the file, because its abandoned lock is released once the TTL lapses.

directional.premise: Daftari enforces that only one server process may hold a vault at a time, sending SIGTERM to any live holder before taking over.
directional.conclusion: Two Daftari processes cannot concurrently corrupt the same vault index, since the newcomer only proceeds once the prior holder has exited.

directional.premise: Daftari's curation engine is advisory: vault_lint reports problems but never edits files.
directional.conclusion: Running vault_lint on a Daftari vault can never itself introduce a regression, because it performs no writes.

directional.premise: The speed of light in vacuum is identical in every inertial reference frame.
directional.conclusion: Two events that are simultaneous in one inertial frame can fail to be simultaneous in another.

directional.premise: The total energy of an isolated physical system is conserved over time.
directional.conclusion: A perpetual-motion machine that produces net work from nothing is physically impossible.

directional.premise: The entropy of an isolated system never decreases, as stated by the second law of thermodynamics.
directional.conclusion: Heat does not spontaneously flow from a colder body to a hotter one without external work being done.

directional.premise: At constant temperature, the pressure of a fixed quantity of ideal gas is inversely proportional to its volume.
directional.conclusion: Compressing a sealed syringe of air to half its volume roughly doubles the pressure inside it.

directional.premise: Objects in free fall near Earth's surface accelerate at the same rate regardless of their mass, absent air resistance.
directional.conclusion: A hammer and a feather released together inside a vacuum chamber strike the floor at the same instant.

directional.premise: Every prime number greater than two is odd.
directional.conclusion: The sum of any two prime numbers that are both greater than two is even.

directional.premise: In a binary search tree, every key in a node's left subtree is smaller than the node's key and every key in its right subtree is larger.
directional.conclusion: An in-order traversal of a binary search tree visits the keys in ascending sorted order.

directional.premise: A hash function maps an unbounded input space into a fixed, finite set of output values.
directional.conclusion: For a large enough collection of distinct inputs, at least two of them must collide to the same hash value.

directional.premise: HTTP is a stateless protocol: each request is processed independently, with no memory of previous requests.
directional.conclusion: Maintaining a logged-in web session requires the client to send an explicit identifier, such as a cookie, with every request.

directional.premise: TCP provides reliable, in-order byte delivery by acknowledging received segments and retransmitting lost ones.
directional.conclusion: An application built on TCP does not need to implement its own logic to detect and reorder out-of-sequence packets.

directional.premise: A pure function returns the same output for the same inputs and produces no side effects.
directional.conclusion: Calls to a pure function can be safely cached or reordered without changing a program's observable behavior.

directional.premise: Natural selection favors heritable traits that increase an organism's reproductive success in its environment.
directional.conclusion: Over many generations, a population's traits shift toward those that improved survival and reproduction in that environment.

directional.premise: Antibiotics kill susceptible bacteria while leaving resistant variants alive to reproduce.
directional.conclusion: Repeated antibiotic use tends to increase the proportion of resistant bacteria in a population over time.

directional.premise: Vaccines expose the immune system to a harmless form of a pathogen so it can build pathogen-specific memory cells.
directional.conclusion: A vaccinated person mounts a faster, stronger immune response when later exposed to the actual pathogen.

directional.premise: Photosynthesis converts carbon dioxide and water into glucose using energy captured from sunlight.
directional.conclusion: A plant kept in complete darkness for a prolonged period depletes its stored sugars and eventually starves.

directional.premise: Compound interest applies each period's interest to both the principal and all previously accrued interest.
directional.conclusion: A sum left to compound grows faster than the same sum earning only simple interest on the original principal.

directional.premise: A diversified portfolio holds assets whose returns are not perfectly correlated with one another.
directional.conclusion: Diversification reduces a portfolio's overall volatility relative to holding any single one of its assets alone.

directional.premise: In a sealed-bid second-price auction, the winner pays the second-highest bid rather than their own bid.
directional.conclusion: A bidder's optimal strategy in a second-price auction is to bid their true valuation of the item.

directional.premise: If every member of a set shares a property, then any particular member of that set has that property.
directional.conclusion: Since every mammal is warm-blooded and a whale is a mammal, a whale is warm-blooded.

directional.premise: A digital signature is produced with a private key and verified with the corresponding public key.
directional.conclusion: A verifier holding only the public key can confirm a message's author without ever learning the signer's private key.

directional.premise: Git identifies every commit by a cryptographic hash computed over its content and its parent commits.
directional.conclusion: Altering any historical commit in a git repository changes the hashes of all commits that follow it.

directional.premise: A B-tree keeps all of its leaves at the same depth and bounds each node's child count within a fixed range.
directional.conclusion: Lookups in a B-tree run in logarithmic time, because the tree's height grows only with the logarithm of the number of keys.

directional.premise: An idempotent operation produces the same result whether it is applied once or many times.
directional.conclusion: A client can safely retry an idempotent API request after a network timeout without risking duplicate effects.

symmetric.a: The market-clearing price is set at the level where the quantity buyers wish to purchase exactly matches the quantity sellers wish to sell.
symmetric.b: The market-clearing quantity is the volume that changes hands at the single price where the supply and demand schedules intersect.

symmetric.a: The predator population's growth rate rises as prey become more abundant, since more prey means more successful hunts and more offspring.
symmetric.b: The prey population's decline rate rises as predators become more abundant, since more predators means more of the prey are caught.

symmetric.a: Player 1's chosen strategy is a best response given that Player 2 plays the strategy Player 2 has chosen.
symmetric.b: Player 2's chosen strategy is a best response given that Player 1 plays the strategy Player 1 has chosen.

symmetric.a: In special relativity, observer A measures observer B's moving clock to be running slow relative to A's own clock.
symmetric.b: In special relativity, observer B measures observer A's moving clock to be running slow relative to B's own clock.

symmetric.a: The flower's nectar reward and corolla shape evolved to fit the morphology and behavior of its specific pollinator.
symmetric.b: The pollinator's tongue length and foraging behavior evolved to fit the nectar placement and shape of its specific flower.

symmetric.a: The price of one dollar measured in euros equals the reciprocal of the price of one euro measured in dollars.
symmetric.b: The price of one euro measured in dollars equals the reciprocal of the price of one dollar measured in euros.

symmetric.a: Body A orbits the system's barycenter because of the gravitational attraction exerted on it by body B.
symmetric.b: Body B orbits the same barycenter because of the gravitational attraction exerted on it by body A.

symmetric.a: Nation A expands its arsenal each year in direct response to the size of Nation B's arsenal.
symmetric.b: Nation B expands its arsenal each year in direct response to the size of Nation A's arsenal.

symmetric.a: The processor's instruction set was shaped to expose exactly the operations the compiler needed to target.
symmetric.b: The compiler's code generator was shaped to emit exactly the operation mix the processor's instruction set executes fastest.

symmetric.a: In this glossary, the term 'velocity' is defined as an object's rate of change of position with respect to time.
symmetric.b: In this glossary, the phrase 'rate of change of position with respect to time' is precisely what the term 'velocity' labels.
